Video.summary: Jahnasia confronts Kelechi about his sudden emotional distance and possible betrayal after years of planning a future together.
Video.title: Arnold vs. Ijomah

Video.summary: Sherman is suing is ex-wife because he claims during their marriage she cheated on him with his best friend.
Video.title: Threatening an Ex

Video.summary: Raven says her friend started hooking up with her ex while they were in Las Vegas, so she's suing for the trip
Video.title: What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas

Image.alt: What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas
What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas
What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas

Video.summary: Imani fights for proof of paternity when Dontel refuses responsibility, demanding DNA before committing to their 1-year-old son.
Video.title: Fann vs. Coleman

Video.summary: Danette & Matthew sleep alone at night because they live in different states. The Cutlers help them decide where to call home.
Video.title: Mahabeer vs. Turner

Video.summary: Rosa says that Michael took her TV to repair and never brought it back and now she wants her money.
Video.title: Please Stand By

Video.summary: Amanda is suing her ex-best friend Bernardo for thousands spent on bail money to hair care.
Video.title: Ya Booze Ya Lose

Video.summary: Deputies save a dog trapped in a vehicle parked in the sun.
Video.title: The Car Driver

Video.summary: WENET plans and executes a large Methamphetamine cartel raid.
Video.title: Mexican Cartel Meth House

Video.summary: Corina broke up with Anthony after choking her but after finding out she's pregnant, sues for child support.
Video.title: Get It On Record

Video.summary: Yumari defends her loyalty and the paternity of her children as Larry questions everything in a custody battle.
Video.title: Hammen vs. Hamrick

Video.summary: A photographer says the defendants told her their wedding ceremony was canceled due to the pandemic, so she refunded their money; she now believes that was a lie, so she's suing.
Video.title: Save the Fake Date

Video.summary: It's music biz mayhem when two men tangle over their boy band. Was it a record label rip off?
Video.title: The Reunion of Swag Kids

Video.summary: Kent loaned Elizabath five grand to help pay for her dental work but is now asking for it back.
Video.title: Love Bites

Video.summary: Ebony challenges Malik's loyalty with a lie detector, testing both his promise and their future in this high-stakes case.
Video.title: Peek vs. Sharpe

Video.summary: Trust issues and tension rise as Danielle confronts Brandon about his ex-wife and lack of motivation.
Video.title: Hatch vs. Banks

Video.summary: After 10 years off and on, Darika eventually kicks Brandon out of the house; a polygraph determines whether he will be going home.
Video.title: Gist vs. Green

Video.summary: Deputy Fontana responds to an overturned vehicle. An intoxicated driver is found sleeping behind the wheel of his vehicle.
Video.title: Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy

Image.alt: Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy
Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy
Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy

Video.summary: Deputy Brady searches for a man wanted for felonious assault and domestic violence.
Video.title: You Can Run but You Can Not Hide

Image.alt: You Can Run but You Can Not Hide
You Can Run but You Can Not Hide
You Can Run but You Can Not Hide

Video.summary: Deputies respond to an ongoing fight between drug users in Pollock Pines. A business owner claims she is being harassed and victimized.
Video.title: Meth Freaks Abound

Video.summary: Deputy Adams eradicates an indoor and outdoor marijuana grow.
Video.title: But I have a Prescription!

Video.summary: Deputy Payne exposes the jumbled and dysfunctional mind of a habitual alcoholic.
Video.title: Drunk as a Skunk

Video.summary: WENET breaks up a party to arrest a group of illegal Mexicans for cock fighting.
Video.title: Pot, Pipe Bombs and Clueless People

Image.alt: Pot, Pipe Bombs and Clueless People
Pot, Pipe Bombs and Clueless People
Pot, Pipe Bombs and Clueless People

Video.summary: WENET and the SED demonstrate a large scale marijuana bust near an elementary school.
Video.title: Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard

Image.alt: Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard
Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard
Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard

Video.summary: Dawn wants her unpaid wages. Stegen says the organizers didn't pay him so he wasn't obligated to pay her.
Video.title: The Exotic Erotic Ball

Video.summary: Shaneequa loved her precious pooch but when she could no longer care for her she found a friend that could.
Video.title: Screwing the Pooch

Video.summary: A baby mama and grandma clash over who fathered the baby boy!
Video.title: Baby Mama Drama

Video.summary: Plaintiff, Reprudentia, is suing a fellow Cameroonian countryman for the $5000 she gave him to buy her a car.
Video.title: Car Troubles

Video.summary: Herve Ambwa is accusing his counsin of selling his beloved Wii gaming console Irvin swears he would never do such a thing and that is was stolen due to his roommates negligence.
Video.title: What Happened to the Wii?

Video.summary: Destiny is suing ex-roomate Bisa for unpaid rent. Bisa is counter suing for moving fees and mental anguish.
Video.title: Too Close for Comfort

Video.summary: Richard argues that Tanya tried to leave his child's birthday party early so he had every right to stop her.
Video.title: The Princess Party Disaster

Video.summary: First, these cousins clash over cash then they spar over cars and finally they moan over loans.
Video.title: Clash of the Cousins

Video.summary: Daryl is suing his ex-friend for missing belongings that he believes were sold to fuel a gambling addiction.
Video.title: Gambling the Friendship

Video.summary: Robert sues property manager Jorge for $10,000, claiming harassment, unlawful entry, and invasion of privacy. Jorge denies the accusations, says he's just doing his job, and countersues for $10,000, alleging he's the one being harassed.
Video.title: Nosey Landlord

Video.summary: Erica sues ex-roommate Palermo for $245.85 in unpaid utility bills, calling him a nightmare and inappropriate. Palermo counters for $3,300, claiming she broke their guest rules and overcharged him for rent.
Video.title: Raunchy Roommate

Video.summary: Quadaisa Nelson sues Marlow White for $1,167.87, claiming he stole the iPhone and laptop he gifted her after an argument. Marlow, who raised her since she was four, says he reclaimed the gifts due to disrespect.
Video.title: A Family Fall Out

Video.summary: The plaintiff says that after her 9-year-old son passed away, she became addicted to heroin but has been clean for 30 years; she is suing her former friend for repayment of a loan, while the ex-friend denies owing her for anything.
Video.title: Past Bonds and Present Debts

Video.summary: A woman says the defendant began cheating on her after she got pregnant with his child; she sues him for unpaid child support; the defendant claims he has fallen on hard times since the pandemic.
Video.title: Broken Promises, Unpaid Dues

Video.summary: Claudette is suing her neighbor for jumping her and falsely accusing her of pullling a gun on her daughter.
Video.title: Gunning for Her Neighbor

Video.summary: Liatwanne petitions the court for rehab for her son, saying he's an addict who started using drugs as a teen.
Video.title: Running with the Wrong Crowd

Video.summary: A man sues his ex-fiance for unreturned property and an engagement ring; she says she left him because he's a raging alcoholic and drug addict.
Video.title: Ring Wraiths

Video.summary: Symoan and Hillary seek answers from the Cutlers' compatibility test in an effort to save their 10-year marriage.
Video.title: Willis vs. Greene

Video.summary: International twerk coach Christopher brings ex-boyfriend Carl to court after they fail at mixing business and pleasure.
Video.title: Lewis vs. Nuckols

Video.summary: Texas pair Joel and Erin go head to head in court to handle some unfinished business after their breakup.
Video.title: Whitaker vs. Estevez

Video.summary: Benjamin petitions for a paternity test after his girlfriend, Kenetha, told him during an argument that he is not the father.
Video.title: Brogdon vs. Jenkins

Video.summary: Alexus seeks vindication because hometown rumors have her boyfriend, Kristopher, questioning the paternity of their child.
Video.title: Davis-Jones vs. Martin

Video.summary: When addiction leads to a family tragedy, the Butlers turn to the judges to learn how to work through their marital issues.
Video.title: Butler vs Butler

Video.summary: Calvin must take a polygraph test after his girlfriend, Johnecia, accuses him of keeping their relationship a secret.
Video.title: Tate vs. Glass

Video.summary: After eight years together, Krystal's pregnancy sparks doubts about her fiancé's addictions and honesty, demanding clarity before marriage.
Video.title: Simmons vs. Stephens

Video.summary: As retribution for his serial cheating, Jaylon sues boyfriend Brian for payment from their online video sharing channel profits.
Video.title: Davis vs. Alben

Video.summary: Joshua demands the return of an engagement ring after Eldrick ends their relationship in a viral livestream.
Video.title: Burroughs vs. Steele
